public_summary: SignalNest AI has traffic, referrals, and partner-webinar momentum, but its homepage creates curiosity without qualified demo requests because buyers cannot tell what the product means for their role.
what_it_represents: A Clarity Map case where the hidden constraint is not the product itself, but the meaning carried by the first screen: who owns the problem, what risk is being reduced, and why the buyer should act now.
visual_brief: Create a professional diagnostic-map image for a B2B SaaS homepage clarity case. Show a dark editorial workspace with a homepage wireframe, four labeled pressure nodes: role ownership, problem cost, trust boundary, safe next action. Visual language: restrained, premium, gold linework, no cartoon figures, no mystical symbolism, no dense readable copy. Aspect ratio 4:5.

public_summary: Studio Cartographer has a newsletter, template, workshop, and coaching offer, but the parts do not create one coherent buying path. Audience resonance is present; commitment is not.
what_it_represents: A Custom Moment Map case where the pieces are individually useful but the relationship between them is incoherent, so buyers cannot tell what to buy first or why.
visual_brief: Create a professional offer-ecosystem map for a creator business. Show four assets as separate cards: newsletter, template, workshop, coaching. Then show one clear gold path from audience attention into workshop decision, with coaching as later branch. Visual language: premium editorial, muted cream/dark contrast, gold connector lines, strategic diagram, no cartoon figures, no fake screenshots. Aspect ratio 4:5.

public_summary: Northline Labs has demand for AI implementation, but every client starts differently and delivery becomes custom sprawl before the first week begins.
what_it_represents: A Custom Moment Card case where the value is not another framework but one repeatable first move that can be used with clients and prospects immediately.
visual_brief: Create a professional implementation card image, not a cute infographic. Show one card labeled internally by structure, not readable sales copy: workflow, owner, failure point, next test, proof metric. Include subtle AI/operations motifs without sci-fi clichés. Premium dark workspace, gold/cream accents, crisp card object, aspect ratio 4:5.

public_summary: LedgerBridge Advisory must separate attention from proof before choosing which campaign message to repeat for the next 30 days.
what_it_represents: A Visual API Ledger case where the hidden constraint is not lack of data but lack of evidence hierarchy: likes, replies, calls, proposals, payments, and referrals are being treated as the same kind of signal.
visual_brief: Create a professional evidence-ledger visual for a consultancy proof loop. Show a structured ledger with signal tiers: attention, fit, commitment, payment, referral, repeat. Use anonymized rows, subtle receipt marks, no client names, no fake revenue claims. Visual language: premium data room, gold/cream accents, dark background, clean hierarchy, aspect ratio 4:5.
